title: Duplicate Items with Automation should have option to include Updates
excerpt: Items and subitems can be duplicated manually, which permits the option to duplicate with or without the Updates. However, duplicating items using automation only does the items/subitems with no option to include the Upd…

posts.author: MPriorGP (MWP)
posts.cookedHtml: Items and subitems can be duplicated manually, which permits the option to duplicate with or without the Updates. However, duplicating items using automation only does the items/subitems with no option to include the Updates. Given all the information contained in the Updates can be very important then having an option in automation to also duplicate the Updates as well is very useful.
